tracks.rawText: 0:46Brass Bruisev5.5Reggaeton with a heavy dembow rhythm, The track features a prominent, punchy kick drum and crisp snare pattern at 90 BPM in the key of G minor, A bright, syncopated brass section plays staccato melodic stabs, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the kick pattern, Male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, melodic rap style with light autotune and short delay effects, A high-pitched, repetitive synth lead provides a melodic hook in the upper register1PublishRemix
